---
subtitle: "CRS Household Consumption"
filters:
  - sorting-hat
  - ripper
extensions:
  sorting-hat:
    keep:
      - r
    verbose: true
  ripper:
    include-yaml: false
    output-dir: "../../tests/testthat"
    output-name: "test-pipeline_node-09"
    script-links-position: "none"
format: gfm
---

Convert CRS individual dietary consumption data to household consumption

```{r}
library(targets)
library(dplyr)
library(here)

devtools::load_all()

```

```{r}
tar_load(
  c(
    crs_indiv_daily_grams_categs_long
  ), 
  store = here("_targets")
)
```

<!-- Data processing goes here... -->

```{r}
crs_hh_daily_grams_categs_long <- {
  x <- c(
    crs_indiv_daily_grams_categs_long
  )
  tibble()
}

crs_hh_weekly_grams_categs_long <- {
  x <- c(
    crs_indiv_daily_grams_categs_long
  )
  tibble()
}

crs_hh_weekly_per_month_wide <- {
  x <- c(
    crs_indiv_daily_grams_categs_long
  )
  tibble()
}
```
